title: Add Back to Home and Clear buttons to Content Generator panel

requirements.text: Add a 'Back to Home' button in `frontend/src/pages/ContentGeneratorPage.tsx` that navigates the user back to the home screen (`/`). The button must be clearly visible at the top or bottom of the Content Generator panel and styled consistently with the existing luxury dark/gold theme.

quotes: دکمه بازگشت قرار بده که وقتی کار تمام شد بتوان به صفحه اصلی رفت

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Back to Home' (بازگشت به صفحه اصلی) button is visible on the Content Generator page.
Clicking the button navigates the user to the home screen (`/`) using TanStack Router.
The button styling matches the existing luxury dark/gold theme and does not interfere with other UI elements.

requirements.text: Add a 'Clear' button in `frontend/src/pages/ContentGeneratorPage.tsx` that resets all input fields (URL input, free-text area, file uploads) and clears the generated content output area, the multi-stage progress indicator state, and any displayed error messages — returning the panel to its initial empty state so the user can immediately enter a new product link and generate fresh content.

quotes: دکمه پاک کردن هم بزار برای وقتی که چندین لینک قرار است نوشته شود که وقتی محتوای تولید شده یکی را برداشتم و کپی کردم با گزینه پاک کردن بتوانم بسرعت لینک بعد را نوشته و تولید محتوا شود

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Clear' (پاک کردن) button is visible on the Content Generator page, positioned near the input area or the generated output.
Clicking 'Clear' resets the URL input field to empty.
Clicking 'Clear' resets the free-text input area to empty.
Clicking 'Clear' removes any uploaded file previews and clears the file input state.
Clicking 'Clear' removes the generated content output (ContentOutput panel, ProductUploadHelper panel) from view.
Clicking 'Clear' resets the multi-stage progress indicator to its initial hidden/idle state.
Clicking 'Clear' removes any displayed error or warning messages.
After clicking 'Clear', the URL input field receives focus so the user can immediately type a new link.
The button is styled consistently with the luxury dark/gold theme and is visually distinct from the 'Generate Content' button.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Navigation must use TanStack Router (already in use), not window.location or manual href redirects.
The Clear action must not trigger a full page reload — all resets must be in-memory React state updates only.
nonGoals: Modifying backend logic or data — the Clear action is purely a frontend state reset.
Adding a confirmation dialog before clearing — the action should be immediate.
Changing the content generation logic, URL parsing, or SEO output format.
